languages.text: "Умолкни и выйди вон, или я прикажу блюстителям вышвырнуть тебя с позором".
"Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."
languages.original_text: "Умолкни и выйди вон, или я прикажу блюстителям вышвырнуть тебя с позором".

traits.locale_text: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."
"Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."
"Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."
"Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."

languages.text: «Muérdase la lengua y retírese, o haré que los guardias lo saquen a patadas del modo más ignominioso».
languages.original_text: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."

traits.locale_text: «Muérdase la lengua y retírese, o haré que los guardias lo saquen a patadas del modo más ignominioso».

languages.text: “闭上嘴，滚出去，否则我会让执法者把你丢出去，让你颜面扫地。”
languages.original_text: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."

traits.locale_text: “闭上嘴，滚出去，否则我会让执法者把你丢出去，让你颜面扫地。”

languages.text: « Tenez votre langue et partez, ou j'ordonnerai aux prévôts de vous jeter dehors comme un malpropre. »
languages.original_text: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."

traits.locale_text: « Tenez votre langue et partez, ou j'ordonnerai aux prévôts de vous jeter dehors comme un malpropre. »

languages.text: "Dilini tut ve defol. Aksi hâlde infazcılara seni rezil bir şekilde dışarı attırırım."
languages.original_text: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."

traits.locale_text: "Dilini tut ve defol. Aksi hâlde infazcılara seni rezil bir şekilde dışarı attırırım."

languages.text: 「黙って出て行け。さもなければ、私、取り締まりの者たちに恥辱を伴って追い出すぞ」
languages.original_text: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."

traits.locale_text: 「黙って出て行け。さもなければ、私、取り締まりの者たちに恥辱を伴って追い出すぞ」

languages.text: "Hütet Eure Zunge und geht, bevor ich Euch von den Enforcern rauswerfen lasse."
languages.original_text: "Hold your tongue and leave, or I shall have the enforcers throw you out in disgrace."

traits.locale_text: "Hütet Eure Zunge und geht, bevor ich Euch von den Enforcern rauswerfen lasse."
